playStoreReviews.text: Just downloaded a week ago. Perfect app for running my small Amazon business. So far everything has worked well and was fairly easy to learn and use. I manufacture a couple of my own items so if there is a future option to include subparts (cost and quantity) in the groups then be able to calculate finished product cost that would be helpful. Great app....thank you.

I am a plumber and I use this to keep track of what parts I have in my van. While the initial set up isn't exactly easy once it is set up (creating groups, etc.) it becomes pretty useful. It helps me keep track of parts without having to go search through the van. I wish it had a way to copy and paste groups. But that's mostly just a formatting thing that isn't necessary. Will probably continue using this app as long as I see the benefit.

This app is Fantastic . I use it for incoming shipments at the Chrysler Dealership. I scan the barcode take a photo. Then later I can just search for a part number and it will come back with the number and a photo. So now I can find parts for invoices that have came in. Not look for barcodes that are supposed to be there and are not. Can't wait to get to work on Monday and put it to action.

For the price it's exactly what I need and worth the money. It keeps getting better every update. It's not a massive POS replacement, but for small business inventory this is well done. The app scans UPC codes quickly (probably according to your phone's camera abilities). During an 8 hour shift I can use this program with my Motorola phone for most of the day. Not sure if it can print. I just got a WiFi printer and will check it out.

I use this app to keep inventory in our pepper locker. It works beautifully. Took me a little while to tweak it the way I wanted it and to get the Excel columns in the order I wanted them but once that was done its great!! Entered my minimums, took inventory and hit one button to get a list of what I need to pick up. Beats hell out of taking my clipboard and pen and writing everything down. I'm a HAPPY PREPPER!! Thanks.

I use this app to sort my inventory in a video game lol, Warframe. I've been making my own spreadsheets for years now for this purpose but never again. The ease of management is huge. You can search by title, description as well as by any other terms you've entered. The best part is that the search covers all inventory regardless of category. I wish I could hit an arrow that would +/- by 1. It's tedious to go through so many steps when you have a lot to enter, frequently and quickly.

I love how simple and fast this app is. This beats using an excel sheet on a mobile device. My only complaint is this. My inventory doesn't accept negative numbers, or backorder. I sell equipment to customers, but sometimes I sell equipment I don't have in my vehicle and need to reschedule in install the equipment in on a later date. It would be nice to see how many pieces of equipment I don't have. Edit: I found the allow negative setting. 5/5 app!

I love this app. We sell on Ebay and Amazon along with other platforms, and this app is affordable and easy to use. I can't say enough good things about it. It allows us to quickly check in items that are one off and add and delete inventory on the fly. Update. I switched to the online 3 user version since it'll allow all 3 of us to check in items at the same time. I was concerned with not being able to import all the items I'd already entered in the simpler version, but was happy to see a simple export to excel, and import into the Pro online version worked flawlessly. Thanks again for this affordable easy to use app.

I love this app! I've tried several inventory apps to record and organize my very large paint inventory and this one is the best BY FAR! I can quickly add a new color to my collection and even add a pic or two for it. It's also very easy to organize items by groups, which I use to separate into different paint brands. And the search function is fantastic! Makes it very easy to find that one specific color I need, and which brand I have it in. Recommend this app to all my fellow artists!

Crop feature doesn't allow independent x,y axis adjustments. Only has corner locked aspect ratio as if all items are only square. Many items I have are rectangular, which means the image will contain the background, or much of the image will be lost just to avoid the background in the photo. Another idea! Remove the 'Crop' function's mandatory code in order to get a photo!

Fairly easy to use. Does go in depth to the point of creating suppliers of products and tracking invoices numbers. For my needs keeping track of inventory on service vehicle is simple, includes pictures of products and options to import and export from excel or equivalent. Didn't really show how to use app very well and just had to experiment to learn how to use.

I was looking for something easy to use. I needed to have the ability to take photos of porduct for easy recognition. Parts # an change but having the photo helps teach me and my staff the item so we can easy learn. It is easy to setup the items. The only thing I do not like is that if I mess up quantity it doesn't allow just to delete. It forms a document towards a customer. Now I have only been using for a week so I could be missing how to do properly. I highly recommend!

OMG! This is the BEST app. I tried 5 or 6 others and kept having issues. I had a question and they answered right away, too. It took a bit for me to figure out all the setup and configuration and map all the fields to my excel spreadsheet. But woohoo! I bought an adapter (C to USB female) to hook to my hand-held scanner (because it seems faster than my phone barcode scanner). It is now easy-peasy to keep up with inventory. It would be great if it hooked to some type of Point of Sale, but hey -- overall, this is a great app!

I've playing around with three or four of these apps, and I'm pretty sure this is the one I want. In fact I am probably going to go ahead and purchase the full version because I don't think I'm going to find anything significantly better anywhere near this price point. Of course it isn't perfect, I have some gripes about the UI- especially when it comes to entering numbers on the min quantity field, but overall this app is fantastic especially for free

A wonderful app, though I seem to have noticed a couple potential bugs (still trying to see if I'm doing something wrong): I have noticed an extraneous thousandths digit where there should be none (3 digit price setting, no items with three digits in goods) This thousandths digit decrements by 2 if you hide groups. Three digit price is necessary for me in order to account for "3 for $x" deals and rounding errors because of them.

Not sure what happened...I downloaded this app yesterday and got all my pictures and inventory set up. It looked great. Everything was in alphabetical order. Should everything I needed. Opened the app this morning and everything was good. Checked back to update my inventory and everything was gone. The entire item list and photos were there, but inventory was zeroed out on everything... nothing but lost time.

I am using this app to keep track of parts for my school bus maintenance shop. I needed something easier that an excel document that wasn't really updatable. This app has every function that I need. I do not need to paid version but I will probably purchase it anyways partly to help support the upkeep of the app. I am still building my inventory list which can be difficult when items are missing their boxes with barcodes but so far I have been able to either find hem online or make them.

I wish there was a way to reset counts. Whenever I want to do inventory I have to manually set all counts to 0. I tried exporting to Excel, resetting counts to 0 in Excel, and importing again but that also doesn't do anything either. I have too many inputs to switch to another app, so I'm stuck using this one even though it's frustrating. Edit: Support explained how to reset counts. Please upload the guide to your help/FAQ section! Contacting support shouldn't be necessary.

This app has helped me so much. I sell Color Street Nail Strips. I was able to make a category for each style & also a total inventory. I have inventory of my supplies, the cost & manufacturer for the next time I need to order. I can post a picture of the item in the inventory too. I've been using this about 2 months & it's great. I can just look at the app if a customer is looking for an item & quickly tell if I have it. It saves me looking through stock & keeps me organized.

This is a great app for inventory management. I must have installed/uninstalled at least 25 of these inventory apps before I found this one. It's not perfect, there is room for improvement, but it's still extremely useful as it is now. The only two gripes I have about the app is, there is no option for adding Tags for inventory items- I would love the ability to add tags like "blue shirt", or something pertaining to the item to help find & narrow down the item list easier. The other gripe is, I would like to see the option to add Shipping Costs to both, item Paid & Purchase prices. Other than that, it's an almost perfect application for the sole purpose of Inventory Management. This app can only get better from here. Thank you to the developer for providing a simple, user-friendly app to help me keep track of my stock! Fantastic job!

Great for a home-baded business starting out. Wish there was a way to empty contents as a group instead of just individually. Overall it has helped me get organized. Edit: Was able to get awesome technical help for my suggestions. Turns out I need a subscription for pricing and they told me how to move the group. Changing my rating to 5 star from 4. :)

Love It for my business. I sell Paparazzi Jewelry so I have thousands of pieces of jewelry to keep track of. Scanning in items is super easy. You can make categories, add unlimited items (which is hard to find,) add customers, add orders in and out, add pictures it each item, names, details, and so much more. ALL FREEEE! It has Everything I need and I have gotten many other consultants to use this and have a team of thousands of consultants that I plan to promote this to too because I love it so much. You can use the free version with I have for over a year and everything I included above is FREE but you can also purchase to add things like prices and it is very affordable but it is not needed. I bought this add on recently and it is amazing. *I came back to also include I broke my phone 🥵 and like I said I have TONS of inventory and I was so upset after I got my replacement with having to add it all back in again I am on day 3 spending hours each day and just realized I can backup it all up! Such an amazing things and lets just say I have it all backed up now so I can add it to all my devices and if my phone breaks again this will never be a problem again!

I'm a loose leaf tea fanatic and I have a LOT of them. I needed a system to keep track of which types I had, which blends within that type, and how many. This app let me make a group "Black Tea" and then add items. For my use, I used the names of individual teas, and then how many of that blend I have. Highly recommend! It's user friendly and a very efficient and smooth UI.

Fantastic app for any size business, easy to use, stable, and easy to learn as well. My only issue is that I really need it to work on IOS too. If this app worked cross platform, it would be the perfect 5 star answer to all my problems with my inventory management. I hope this is something that is in the works, otherwise I will be forced to seek out an app that is, and I really dont want to! Let me know, and Ill stick it out as long as possible.

Use this app to keep up with my Color Street stock. I like that I can use the barcode or just type the sku number since they don't always have the barcode. Removing stock is straight forward and easy. Adding new sets is easy. It's the adding new inventory of products already added that gets complicated and could use some work.

Would have been great, but doesn't track expiration dates// Edited to address response. I didn't say you had. Nor am I "blaming" you for anything. This app is intended to track inventory. The small business (not personal use) has product that expires. While the app may work "as intended", without an expiration tracker, I cannot manage inventory properly. My review is based on my opinion of it's functionality as an inventory management tool- Okay, but could be better. No need to get defensive.

This app is amazing. Using for more than 4 years and it helped me a lot in tracking my business. Response from the team is quick for any issue. Simply love the app. it has become an integral part of my business activity, Excellent for small traders like us. Awaiting for more updates on report. Well done! keep going!

Simple, Easy & Intuitive As soon as I started using it, I understood that this is exactly the app I needed. Features are clear, easy and intuitive. Reports are available and support is given (a bit late but still, it was provided). Wish it had the ability to disable a product when no longer in stock so that it would disappear from list (I did it by moving to sub category). Also would have wanted the option to transform item into sub-items (in (A) - transform / out(B,C,D,E).

A very easy to use but you should include price for the free app because am trying to pay for it but cannot complete paying through M-pesa. For the outgoing it should indicate the name of the product rather than the document number.

To enable multiple users, the app tells you to download the Online version, which looks identical but blue. However, it doesn’t mention upfront that it’s free for only one user and requires a paid subscription for multi-user access. Without the subscription, it offers nothing beyond the original app, making the download and setup a waste of time. I spent an hour creating cloud and device backups to then discover this hurdle. The barcode reader sometimes messes up. Check each scan thoroughly.

the most amazing application of all applications of all applications I've been heard since I began knowing applications. it's very affordable for even small income earners but without bugs and heavy features. It has brilliant caring loving customer service and highly convenient. The application makes me smile as I use it. Thank you so much Chester team 🙏
I use it to track Livestock inventory. It's not designed for that so not a perfect match but the most useful I've found.
Simple to use the app. But I have one problem, that is I cannot export a pdf document of different outgoing documents with different dates in one pdf file. Is there a way to do it?

I got this app to keep a record of my movie collection, which is getting a little out of hand. It works well enough for that purpose even though it's meant more for a retail situation. I like that I can quickly check my inventory to make sure I don't buy an extra copy of a movie because I forgot that I had it..

I'm using it to inventory my home pantry, freezers, shelving. Keeps me organized and tracks where I put stuff. It's improved a LOT since I first started using it. Wish reporting could be used to tell me what I'm out of, or even be able to build custom reports by choosing fields.
great app. only wish i could manually arrange my items the way i want instead of by names quantity etc.

This app is great. I am probably not using it to it's full potential. it is simple to use and does make my life easier when I am keeping track of my inventory. I totally recommend this app to any business owner with inventory to keep track of.

Stock and Inventory Simple! Well, it is simple but it has more features than the title might imply. It's not supposed to have everything for everyone, but it does more than I'd hoped for. Big thumbs up from me. After a few weeks of use I have started using a few of the extra features. If you want to start again just delete all the documents. All items will be at zero but all items will still be in the database, or you can use the stock check option to adjust. ☆☆☆☆☆

So far I am loving this app! Keeps everything so organized. Has so many different options yet its very simple and easy to use. It shows you the growth of your sales and keeps track of your inventory. You could also print reports out as well so you have reference of what's being sold. Couldn't ask for a better or more convenient way to keep track of everything. Beats the old pen and paper!

Exactly what I was looking for. Needed a simple app that can scan barcodes of the items bought during each round of grocery shopping and log it for export to excel so it can be imported into my accounting program. Interface is intuitive, I could figure it out quickly what each menu did. Logging names of new goods is easy but will be tedious. Logging each grocery purchase as a new document is quick with the multiscan feature. Have not tested the export to excel yet, but have high hopes!

I have only installed this app about 8 hours ago and I love it so far although I am finding a few things a little difficult to figure out at first but once you can get everything working properly it is so easy. I think it is just taking the time to learn it all as there are many options. I have only had the chance to put in half my inventory so far but splitting the products into different groups is very helpful. I will update my rating as time goes by and let everyone know how it is going.

Its very neat and easy to understand, the report list are the best! But i noticed after i updated it today, the barcode scanner seem a little bit difficult to detect the barcode, welp. As a matter of fact, it can't even detect the barcode anymore because i tried like.. 10 minute on the scanner. Anyway overall its the best stock listing apps, thou im using the free version but its still very good to keep you up to date with your stock in easy way.

Excellent! I actually couldn't be happier with this app. I wanted something super simple to catalog and keep track of inventory of the stickers I sell on eBay and this has ticket every box! I use the free version as it does everything I need. No ads too! Honestly, I spent ages looking for something that worked for me and this was it! Thank you!

Super efficient, easy to use. It revolutioned my stock keeping at trading stalls. It includes useful copy functions and a description field for each item where i can put the location (in my case the relevant box at the stall). It also makes it easy then to tally what's left in each box after the event in case of insurance claims. I love it. Strongly recommend it.
loving this app for keeping track of inventory. It is straightforward and easy to use.

free option with no ads. thank you so much lol only using the inventory part to be able to see anywhere anytime what I have. easy to use. love the fact I can attach pictures to each item. helps to locate small things.

First of all, I would like to thank you for providing us with a great product! I used to be able to import images from an Excel file, but after updating to the latest version 2.0.91, I can no longer do so. This does not seem to be a problem with my spreadsheet. If I export the database to an Excel file in Stock and Inventory Simple and then import back that file, the images won't load. Could you please investigate this issue? Thank you for your support.
After using this for over a year I can confidently give it my support, apart from inventory and keeping logs, printing labels is very nice!
this app is working good and easy to maintain my stock I don't need PC I can do it my phone and get the report

Hello, I get a purchase error on the subscription page: “There was a problem with the store / StoreProblemError”. I already restarted the phone and checked Google Play, but it still does not work. Please help.
Really easy for me to use to keep track of stock and fabulous support from the team.

Great App with most features free. Occasional crashes but doesn't limit the use for me. Allows me to keep track of my stock levels and the reports help me see monthly totals. I really want the prices add on and to increase the customer limit but I will not subscribe. I would rather pay up front to unlock it - allow this and it's 5 star for me.

Hands down the best stock counting app out there. I have been going to and fro about ten or so different apps and this is the one. Handles xls files, able to scan smoothly functions in a very user friendly manner. The ability to edit while stock taking your items is invaluable.  Also functions as a very useful product database in a retail shop environment.  Only drawback I would say is that because it is reading xls files, it is not as fast as say, some apps which use csv as the database, but it's a huge benefit using xls files as you do not need to mess about with formatting and making sure your product names have the correct format and no special characters etc. Also, the more powerful your phone the less you notice that anyway.  Would highly recommend this as the only stock taking/inventory handling app you require.

This app is a great resource for anyone looking for an inventory app for their store like me. I found it very useful. However, there are some features that can be added such as: 1."Method of sale" Whether it is wholesale or retail. There should be two prices for an item, there is also a retail and wholesale price. 2."Barcode scanner" The item being barcoded must be seen so that the items that have been barcoded can be known. 3."Laptop/PC Version"

Excellent, intuitive, love it Edit: been using it every day for a while, paid for the subscription and I can say money well spent, being able to track the prices of the items as soon as you scan them and getting out a nice list of what left the warehouse and how much did it cost is everything for me.

If you could add 2 function. It would be perfect!!!! 1) enable to sort inventory by tagging Etc - I tagged a few inventory as lighting in few stores. I can sort a list of these inventory just by clicking the lighting tag 2) insert a visible section of the items in which store. It's related to first point above. After I've sorted a list of all the tagged item. I can click into any of the inventory item and see a visible section this item currently stocked in which store.

a very long winded way of stock taking for a food premises. Very difficult to add .2 or .7 of food items and takes an absolute age to add items made in house. I'm sure its great if you want to count stock in a warehouse but in a kitchen, forget about it. Unfortunately you have to download and subscribe to find this out. That's the reason for the 2 stars, just wasted an hour of my time.

A fantastic piece of software that has helped me no end. Never had any issues in the 3 years or so of use. Having a bin location field for products would be a great additional feature for future versions, I use multiple locations for same parts so this would help locate them. First rate keep up the good work.

I love this app, I tried a lot of options but this one it's far more complete than others, you can have your own client database (with all their info) and control their debts and payments and you can control your inventory as you want. The only detail is that it will be wonderful if you could have an IPhone version too.

I use this at work, to make lists for my boss, it's simple to use and I can export to excel so he can print and make decisions on what to order. It's a fantastic app. I just wish there was an IOS version so I didn't need to use my own personal phone, and could use my work one instead !! 😅

This apps is what I'm looking for, however user have to pay for premium features to get the apps does it best. There are few things could be improved too, or may be it's already there but I won't find out until I pay for it 😅. I'm still thinking to pay for this apps or the online version 🤔. I like this version so far but I need to use it in multiple devices (phone, tablet and laptop) which I dont think this version has/allow that. Overall, for single user, I recommend this apps ☺

This app is Magical 👌 I'm not gonna lie, I'm addicted to the printing feature. It's so powerful. Here are some additions I'd really kill for 1. QR code for document pdfs. It would be super useful. 2. Secured printing for specific templates 3. User defined values that can be obtained as functions of available numerical values like price, amount, etc. 4. A way to share templates to the community Also, 1. Naming of documents 2. Pin protected documents.
The latest update deleted all my inventory!! What a complete disaster!
really easy to use, an excellent tool

I really enjoy the app (free version) it does what I need it to do to keep up with my inventory. I just wished there were more options for the paid version because I really only need certain parts but I would have to pay for everything although I don't need it. Which has prevented me to subscribe.

Good app but important features missing. Regex based rule setting for product names so that employees enter names adhering conventions. In free version can't see what custom fields entail, are various data types available to choose for the field e.g date, currency, list box, color picker, contacts etc.

best so far, I tried a few different apps all filled with ads. this one is all I need let's me insert infi and a photo and give me multiple options to print. I can get a inventory like, labels. its easy to separate by color, design and texture. life changer

I've used this for a few months now. It is the only one I have a tried. I am a tradesman & use this for the various parts I need to keep in stock in & out the van. Very tedious adding items, but this would be the same with all apps I'm guessing. So far its saved me from duplicating stock I had forgotten about.

Still waiting for update for backing up to SD card for better security reasons, it has been around 1 and 1/2 years already. Any idea when? Can't really trust web storage systems now a days, at least for now. Still new to this APP and loving it, but that is one of the first very important issues I would love to see happen. Storing only to internal is a huge problem for hand held devices as they tend to struggle for space, especially in a Inventory APP where lots of data exists

I like the app overall, but not being able to have a duplicate names under a different folder is a little frustrating. They all have to be appended with something unique to make it work. Having a feature to account for incoming items that are not yet available would also be great (pending order/delivery before it's added to the current Inventory)
Perfect to keep track of inventory
great apps for inventory management 👍
Great program for tracking inventory. just wish it didn't cost so much
Once you set it up, it's amazing! I use mine for my locksmith key inventory.
This is a useful app and easy option

Im going to try for a month, if this apps good enough or more than "boxhero" i will buy life time service Update No 1. 1 week later, this app is soo gooodddd You can pay with google payment for full access, in my country (indonesia) i can call the price cheap enough. No 2. This app is easy to use, little bit learning for pricing and boom you can check every transaction, every price, every stock item. Its very useful, saving money for life time acces.

Really loving this app... It would be very helpful if integration with my accounting system was possible, enabling me to add SOH automatically when I add a supplier invoice through my accounting program and when a certain item is sold through a certain store, automatically changing the quantity in that specific store Overall, making inventory tracking very easy and manageable.
its very easy, and usefull, very nice,

Good. Altho i would like more features and then i would conaider paying Features i would like to see more is. A data sheet with all the products in the inventory that i can have from excel or it would come ready. Features like adding numbers to products. I have products like perfumes that has numbers under the perfume but i have no way to put it under a certain LOT.

I have a chest freezer and trying to keep track of what is hiding in the depths is a constant struggle. So far this app has shown a lot of promise. I'm able to do what I need, it's been easy to figure out, and I've liked the available options for how to display things. Only time will tell if it works long term but so far I like it a lot!

Was looking for something easier than a spreadsheet to keep my cost of goods up to date. This indicated that it could do so, but turns out its behind a paywall, even though "Register Sales and Purchases;" does not indicate as such in its discription... Response..not expecting everything free.

The perfect inventory app. This made my life much easier :) At first, I didn't know how to manually add photos of the products, but I just needed to enable it from settings. After that it was perfect! I don't know if I can share the inventory with another user or have the "store" on multiple devices on the free version. That would be cool.

This is the best inventory app as a collector. Scanning barcodes and adding descriptions is a great feature. When you search within the app you can type in your descriptions and it will bring up all the items that fall into that description. It's great. Any chance you wi have this available for iPhone?

So far really like the app, but I find myself with a problem. I have different barcodes for the same items in my inventory, and would love to see an option to store multiple barcodes to one item. I have looked at a lot of other inventory apps but have not found that option anywere

I work as inventory guy in a warehouse I get a daily inventory packet everyday. I needed something just to simply keep track of item numbers and locations on my phone. I don't run a business I wanted to make looking up item numbers and locations at work more convenient. I downloaded several apps tried them and this 1 by far was the best.

Using to manage sales internally in our small team. Works great. Left a tablet and as anyone take anything they register themselves. No more paper and unreadable handwriting. Must pay the monthly fee do get customers and custom prices feature, but worth it for the time it saves me. Love that it is offline. No forcing me to cloud and no always online required. Just works.

So far, very user friendly. It's doing everything I needed! I've only had it for a few hours and have easily entered hundreds of products for the artisan shop I am curating. The 3.99 a month is very reasonable to pay for the added price feature. Thanks y'all! You've made my job easier!

Simply amazing! I have been looking for a solution for stock keeping with prices and plenty of customizable options. Today, I have finally found it for a reasonable price. Extremely easy to use, you can customize it to your needs, and so much more. Even handles our currency, which is a huge plus. Thank you!

Great app, it helped me with inventory of over 10k different items. Our products have a lot of working parts and this helps me keep track of what we have. I can create inventory lists and send to my guys as well as as outgoing so they can prepare orders. Only wish it was for iPhone as well so all my guys can use it.

Update: I emailed them and they were very quick to respond and help resolve the issue! Everytime I try importing from CSV I get an error and it puts all the data from the other columns into the item name. Even though I have the file setup correctly. I even added an item manually and exported it to make sure the formatting was correct

I love this app. It is easy and efficient. Love the calculator to help you work out stuff, the barcode system and the ability to add pictures. Love the fact that you can export it to excel etc. I use this app to manage inventory in a storeroom at work. Wish it had the ability to add expire dates and also to alert you when stock is out or low.

I like the feature that i can add photos for the items for easier visualization. But can I suggest when I export to excel, maybe add in all details like the photos. Because when i export to excel, only the name and quantity is carried over. Or is there a way to do this that i haven't discovered yet?

Loved the app but One thing If you add in future it would be realy nice is the expiry notification just like low stock alerts where I could add expiry date and then it will show on goods section in red text and also I must be able to sort it using that expiry that. Eventhough I can do something similar by using custom attribute but still I cant get the ability to view it in red color and recieve alerts for it.

Very useful once you learn how it works. I have multiple warehouses to track, so I just scan all the parts for one, then export it to Excel. Then zero out the qty of all the parts and I'm ready to inventory the next location. And it's free.

works very well for my organizing needs. thank you!! wish you could have a multicolor, and pattern options for folders. also edit a product to add a source field, also not require a name field, also add products by photo many at a time. still great for inventory needs.

Works so far. Kinda odd and needs improving. When adding an item to inventory there is a plus and minus button but they don't do anything except open a menu to type the quantity. I would have assumed they manipulated the inventory total but they do not. The application functions as intended for the descriped function.

I have been looking for a way to keep my inventory better. I have tried mulitpe other apps. And right now this is the best one. Plus very easy to use. Every other app I have used befour was not this well done or easy to keep track of what you sell and get in. I have so many papers of inventory. I am still working on putting in. I am so glad I came across this.

So far so good. Can't figure out why prices dont export to excel when exporting any document. it'd be a 4 star if this worked. if pictures could export too it'd be a 5. If multi-user support were here and or internet database barcode access, i'd lose my mind with happiness. If any of these change I'll update my review.

playStoreReviews.text: App is fast and straight foward to use after master file is imported.  It runs fine on a 7 year old Samsung Tablet/Android 4.1.2.  Ran into an issue when testing on a Samsung Galaxy S10e and paired with a bluetooth scanner that the scans would not read the product UPCs exactly and resulted in mismatches with the master file. Scanned UPCs had an extra digit prepended to the actual UPC.  Narrowed down the issue to the onscreen keyboard interfering with the scans.  Go to General Management -> Language and input -> Physical keyboard (BT Scanner) and toggle Show on-screen keyboard to off.  Would like to request a feature from the devs. Please add an option to reset scanned results to 0.  Right now, we have to manually go down each entry and type in '00' if we want to zero out the inventory.  Would be a great time saver.  Thanks for your work!

App is great. Simple, fast and very reliable with a barcode scanner. The problem is that there is no way to give it storage permission to load product details. I have to manually configure them and it is a pain to do. I think it is a coding bug in the latest version or an incompatibility with my Samsung or Android 13.

We have used this app with success in our small business. I would prefer that there were an option to add a new record if a duplicate barcode is scanned. Currently a duplicate scan will increment the counter by 1. This is a problem if someone, for example, is scanning cartons of up-stock and individual items during the same scan session. I much prefer using an app that will insert a new record for each scan with the option to edit the scanned quantity. Other app I've used incorporates this ability by default and will aggregate the quantities of duplicate barcodes at upload. Because of this reason we will not be using this app in the future. I will certainly reconsider if this functionality is added.

Really like this app. One thing I would like to see is a calculator installed in the app to add or subtract counts. You can use the + and - buttons to increase or decrease one at a time, bot would like to increase or decrease larger amounts at a time. (Example: 100-25 or 100+25, etc.) Still a useful app.

xScanPet is a comprehensive application that uses Android mobile phones to scan barcodes and enter the information into excel type spreadsheets.  My natural instinct was to try to run the app without "reading the instructions", but because of its comprehensive nature, viewing the instruction videos to get you on your way is necessary. In fact, I had to go through the videos several times before "getting the hang" of the app.  The reason it takes some effort to understand xScanPet is that it is capable of executing a range of tasks, but in the end I am glad of putting in the effort. Technical support via email is prompt. I wholeheartedly recommend it.

Review Update After Three Years Of Use: I implemented XscanPet into our company as a trial on stock control. Using tablets, Bluetooth scanners and a simple labeling system it is now a necessity across all three SEPARATE locations involving £70,000+ of stock. Coupled with DropSync and DropBox they all update each other minute to minute. With desktop shortcuts to the shared file in DropBox the office and sales managers have access to an immediate and accurate stock list. Needless to say, i can't praise it enough

I figured creating labels with a smart phone would allow me to easily create labels that were more customized than basic printers offered, so I bought the Brady M211, but this app is horribly unintuitive & poorly designed, making the process time consuming, frustrating & overly complicated. Also, basic processes require too many button pushes. It's all too hard to explain in a short review. If the app at least worked, I could overlook the overpriced cartridges.

they made updates to the app which made the whole experience so much worse. if that wasnt bad enough, i cant use the app for more than 5 minutes without it crashing. by the time i finish writing out all my labels the app crashes and i have to write it out all over again. i have 2 of their machines and theyre basically useless to me now. and why is it that i have to connect to my machine every time i use the app? it should remember that its my machine

Fails to allow users to access Excel files. Additionally, should be re-coded to pull more than one column of data out of a spreadsheet file, this is unacceptably poor. Latest update gas a 'got it' help message that intrudes upon the functionality of the app, and bypassing it forces the app to hang for no reason. And, when I get the app going finally, there is no way to edit existing text without erasing the old text box. The text box editor should not be auto completing or adding punctuation.

The app is OK. I like being able to make the labels on my phone. My biggest complaint is when using patch panels, multi label shrink tubes, etc, you don't have the option to go to the next label. You have to click off of it open the text options, click off it again to clear, then click on the next area to start typing again. Why not just have the option to jump to the next label without all the hassle. It adds a considerable amount of time. At that point, you might as well just use the printer.

Horrible app, difficult to create the simplest of labels. I am used to using the BMP-21 PLUS, and find it impossible to create the same wire wrap labels and very difficult to create a simple landscape banner label. The app constantly reformats the rows and glitches out. Once it does that, you have to start all over because it won't let you edit the lines that blanked out. Why couldn't it be as easy as picking a label style, font and font size like any other label. Great idea, very poor execution

-The app is not intuitive or organized, Options and features are scattered all over the place! -It doesn't allow you to select fraction sizes like 1.5, 1.75,.. and there is no option to select the wire size so it will adjust the length automatically, but rather some fixed sizes 1",2",. -The Blank / Free lable option has serious bugas as it doesn't differentiate between the Vertical / Horizontal option!! -No matter what I tried to do, I couldn't get it to print a Circuit Breaker lable, properly!

Looks good, impossible to use! I have a list longer than a page of things that are extremely hard or impossible to do. I had hoped for an easy experience, but my $250 M211 turned into an expensive disappointment. How can i provide you detailed feedback? Easy things like filling a label with multiple lines of maximum size text across it in landscape mode isn't actually possible. Neither is wasting less than an inch of ribbon for every print. Zooming and moving text around is at best flaky.

Needs work. It is very difficult to just add text and move it around to line things up the way you want. The GUI needs to be more usable. Every time you go to do something you trigger pop ups and things you don't want to. I was creating a 4 inch label to be printed along the label. Adding two simple text boxes, one as the title, "Milwaukee Tools" in a larger font then the tool name underneath in a smaller font was a real task. Great little printer but so hard to do basic things.

This app is horribly disappointing. I've been using a BMP-21 for years and it's wonderful, I purchased an M211 printer to replace it as a more compact unit to transport. I just want to create the same labels as the BMP-21, but it's horribly complicated to create a basic label. If you make a wire label and want to adjust the length it erases all the label text and makes you start again. It seems the designers tried packing too many features into the software instead of making a good interface.

This app's functionality leads to significant label tape wastage due to the disproportionately small writing space in comparison to the label dimensions. It's unclear whether this issue stems from inadequate beta testing or if it's an intentional design choice. Unfortunately, there doesn't appear to be an alternative method for creating labels for the m211 printer. If you are an app developer you could make some money by providing a pay app that actually worked. This printer cost nearly $300.

App crashes and refused to pair to several Andriod phones. Brand new device. Tested and reinstalled on S25, S25 Ultra, Z Fold 7, S24, All crashed and none of them worked. Not worth the money for the printer, Will likely be returnjng it if I can't make this work in 24 hours, And then never look at Brady again. Worst Experience I've ever had at the start of using a product.

Worked fine before updates. After updates 80% of the time the app just sits at thr brady express labels splash screen and never progresses. Have to force close app and restart it multiple times and maybe it will work again. Happening on a galaxy s23 ultra, and a pixel 9 fold pro. Both same issue. Seems to have happened after the addition of voice labels.

Not intuitive. Very difficult to use full label as majority of label when setting up is marked as non printable. Don't like the no preview before printing, again wasting label material. Maybe I'm just dumb. Edit I am dumb 3 stars now. But I have yet, after much searching on the brady website, to find a manual that details solutions to the issues I am experiencing. And I have owned a Brady 2200TLS since 2008 and use3d many others so not new to labelers. Just can't get labels for it anymore.

Im using this app on a Samsung 23+ I believe. The app is extremely cumbersome. If you want to print verticle label it's very difficult to setup. It will literally print horizontal and vertical at same time. After 20 mins of trying deleting resetting. I went to conventional label maker and 10 seconds I was done. For a standard label. It works.
App is super easy to use, and works great with the printer, but I'm having stability issue where it crashes every few minutes when doing larger projects.
very good product. tons and tons of options, but the software is just a smidge clunky. it is not easy to share the printer with multiple people. otherwise very nice product.

Terrible interface. Crashes. Not user friendly at all. Update: Contacted tech support, was put on hold for a long time while the CS ran to his demo room to use the M211 printer. Then told, he wasn't sure how to use it and needed to talk to the developers. No resolution was provided. This product doesn't work well to load excel files and print lots of labels. It's basically the standard labeler but your keyboard is your cell phone. This product was no doubt rushed to selves to make a buck.

Well, I have uninstalled the app, cleared it, and reinstalled it. It works now on my s23untra. Im new to the app, and i do find it hard to understand. I have not seen any useful tutorials of the app as of right now. I'm planning to reach out to technical support for some guidance.

Poor Interface and Experience I was disappointed to find the interface is clunky and the experience is poor. Issues include: resize handles on text often don't work and do not resize in real time, pinch to zoom also does not zoom in real time, switching label size causes issues & many more. Frankly the entire app and interface needs a massive overhaul. It actually has turned me off buying a Brady label printer when I was set on buying a Brady M511. Good hardware let down by bad software
Great app! Copy and paste would be nice.
Not user friendly. Cumbersome and clumsy UI. For such an expensive label maker, the app seems to have been outsourced to someone who never uses the printer.
Over an hour wasted and I still cant print a readable label! This app is infuriating.

no longer has features it used to have as that are advertised. got a new phone, now no longer has the screen to connect to cloud storage , and when I try to load the excel files I have used for 3 years, it says it is an unsupported file format. the files are not corrupted , the app has gone back to trash status. it was getting better as they added a caps lock function that it frustratingly lacked when I started with it 3 years ago, but still has a ton of ui issues trash 🗑️🗑️🗑️

If you have to change the label supply, it will force you to create a "new blank label". It doesn't even try to convert what you have to a new supply. If you could copy the data and paste it, it would at least make it usable. But no... 48-port patch panel has to be manually re-typed just because. Absolute garbage software. 5-star for the printer. 1-star for the app development.

it's bad and frustrating to use. don't hit enter while in text entry for a label! also found that cable types nor cable measurements are not listed as options for labels. This app needs to be more fleshed out so it has feature parity with the their cheapest stand-alone labelers if this app is required to be used with their non-stand-alone labelers (no buttons or screen). printed labels are not as shown in the screen.

update: Got the email saying to update from the store. Updated outside of work hours so I had time to revert it should anything go wrong. the app works great now. Thank you for taking the time to email me the old copy of the app so that I could get my M211 working while yall fixed the update. This is one tool I use the most in my work and love it's compact size. The app no longer crashes and I can freely update it now.

Really solid app. Make sure and get the right kind of labels, Brady changed the standards so you have to buy the new Authentic style with the A logo. Definitely annoying but the new labels are backwards compatible with the older printers. All in all I love this new platform, well done Brady USA.

Not perfect, i have some trouble with the margin. the apps freeze sometimes. the option to take picture is horrible. i would like to be able to make multiple different tag from one picture. pdf is slow and cannot make multiple different tag.

Works some of the time. when I first open the app I can easily make adjustments to the label I need. But when using it and I need to make adjustments, a lot of the times I can't change the font size. Also, I can't easily go back to the menu to change fonts and sizes.

The idea of this is great but app is not ready for mainstream. Very quirky. Even trying to edit a once printed label turns into a disaster. Essentially useless until software team gets the app fixed.
